description: Hand-computed cases for computeJaro and computeJaroWinkler. All expected values are derived from the algorithm definition rather than echoed from the implementation, so the fixture independently verifies the arithmetic. Floating-point results are rounded to 4 decimal places. Wikipedia benchmark cases (MARTHA/MARHTA, DWAYNE/DUANE, DIXON/DICKSONX) are included as a cross-check against the published reference values.

cases.label: two empty strings are identical — returns 1 via a === b shortcut
empty vs non-empty — no characters to match
non-empty vs empty — no characters to match
completely dissimilar strings — no characters in common within any window
Wikipedia benchmark: MARTHA / MARHTA — m=6, t=1 (T↔H transposition), l=3
Wikipedia benchmark: DWAYNE / DUANE — m=4, t=0, l=1
Wikipedia benchmark: DIXON / DICKSONX — m=4, t=0, l=2
